name: branch-deploy
description: Enabling Branch Deployments through IssueOps with GitHub Actions

scripts.package: ncc build src/main.ts -o dist --source-map --license licenses.txt --target es2022
scripts.check: npm run format-check && npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:runtime && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.all: npm run check && npm run package
scripts.act: npm run package && act issue_comment -e events/issue_comment_deploy.json -s GITHUB_TOKEN=faketoken -j test

author: Grant Birkinbine
